✳ Est. 2017 · Cuba Street, Wellington

Precision cuts, sharp fades & the hot-towel shave.

Ironclad Barber Co. is a six-chair shop on Cuba Street built for men who want the cut done right — no rush, no guesswork, just craft.

Book Your Appointment Explore Services

IBNo. 17
Walk-in cut from$30

✳The Service Menu

Pricing in NZD · cash & card · students 15% off weekdays

SVC—01

The Ironclad Cut

A full consultation, scissor-and-clipper cut tailored to your hair and head shape, finished with a hot towel and style.

$4045 min
SVC—02

Skin & Taper Fades

Clean, blended fades from a zero skin up to a soft taper. Sharp lines, no harsh jumps — the cut we're known for.

$4545 min
SVC—03

Beard Sculpt & Line-Up

Razor-defined edges, shaped and balanced to your jaw, hot-towel softened and finished with beard oil.

$3530 min
SVC—04

Hot-Towel Straight Shave

The full ritual — hot towels, pre-shave oil, a traditional straight-razor shave, cold towel and balm. Pure reset.

$5040 min

✳How a Visit Runs

Booked or walk-in · roughly 45 minutes a chair

01

Sit & Consult

We talk through what you want, what grows well, and what'll actually hold week to week — before a single clipper touches your head.

02

The Craft

Scissor work, fades and razor lines done unhurried. A coffee or a beer while you wait — no conveyor-belt energy here.

03

Finish & Hold

Hot towel, style and a product tip so you can rebuild the look at home. You leave looking like you meant it.

✳The Chairs

Book by name or take the first one free

Marcus Vea

Master Barber · Founder

Opened Ironclad in 2017 after a decade behind the chair. Lives for a clean skin fade and a properly mapped beard.

Danny Rou

Senior Barber

The straight-razor specialist. If you want the traditional hot-towel shave done with real ceremony, book Danny.

Tomasi Lewa

Barber · Textured Hair

Curls, coils and textured cuts are Tomasi's lane. Sharp, modern shapes that work with your hair, not against it.

✳From the Chair

4.9 average · 380+ Google reviews

"Best fade I've had in Wellington, full stop. Marcus actually listens."

— James T.

"The hot-towel shave is worth every cent. Walked out feeling brand new."

— Pita R.
★★★★★

"Finally a barber who knows textured hair. Tomasi is the only chair I book."

— Andre M.

Your chair's waiting.

Open Tue–Sat · 9am–6pm · 184 Cuba Street, Wellington

IB Ironclad Barber Co.

A six-chair barbershop on Cuba Street, Wellington. Precision cuts, fades, beard work and traditional hot-towel shaves since 2017.
